data.title: Write test-fix-bug-worktree-integration.sh
data.description: Create tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-worktree-integration.sh. 3 assertions: (1) fix-bug/SKILL.md contains 'single-agent-integrate', (2) Step 7 section contains WORKTREE_PATH or single-agent-integrate, (3) grep -c 'isolation_enabled=false.*existing' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md > 0 (returns 0 on unmodified file; verifies T7 added explicit false-branch clause). All 3 RED before T7. testing_mode: RED
